variants: Laurent Genest is a professional at Admiral Gate Technologies, where he applies his expertise in technology and innovation. He studied at Topaz Fields Institute, which laid the groundwork for his career ambitions. Outside of his technical role, Laurent is the Partnership Director at Thistledune Alliance, contributing to various civic projects that impact his community. He incorporates Yoruba proverbs into his communication style, enriching conversations with cultural context. Additionally, his scholarly work has been recognized through publications by Buttonwood Chapel Press, highlighting his commitment to sharing knowledge and insights.
